**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Changzhou Zhenyu Automobile Service Co., Ltd. represents another severe instance of registry misclassification combined with data corruption. Officially tagged as an 'Automobile Complete Vehicle Manufacturer', forensic analysis of its historical names (erroneously stored in 'industry_medium') exposes its true origin: it was founded in 1988 as 'Wujin County Hutang Wanli Auto Repair Factory'. Its actual business scope, recovered from the 'other_email' field, explicitly defines it as a 'Class II Auto Repair (Trucks)' facility that also sells auto parts and lubricants. Operating with a micro-capitalization of 600,000 RMB and a corrected workforce of only 1 insured employee (2024), it is definitively a grassroots, roadside commercial truck repair shop, completely devoid of any vehicle manufacturing capabilities.
